hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select FA.ID_FUENTE_ALERTA AS "idFuenteAlertaPk", RN.NOMBRE AS "nombre", FA.CREACION_FECHA as "creacionFecha", (SELECT count(*) "TOTAL" FROM SGALERTASSYS.FUENTE_ALERTA_DETALLE FAD with (nolock) WHERE FAD.ID_FUENTE_ALERTA = FA.ID_FUENTE_ALERTA) as "cantidadRegistros" FROM SGALERTASSYS.FUENTE_ALERTA FA with (nolock), SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) where FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AND FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio,FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND FA.CREACION_FECHA BETWEEN :fechaPreparacionInicio AND :fechaPreparacionFin

select count(*) FROM SGALERTASSYS.FUENTE_ALERTA FA with (nolock), SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) where FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AND FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio,FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND FA.CREACION_FECHA BETWEEN :fechaPreparacionInicio AND :fechaPreparacionFin
SELECT rn.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AS "id_Regla_negocio", rn.NOMBRE AS "nombre", rn.ESTADO AS "estado" FROM SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO rn with (nolock) ORDER BY 1
DELETE FROM SGALERTASSYS.FUENTE_ALERTA_ADICIONAL ADI WHERE ADI.ID_FUENTE_ALERTA = :id_fuente_alerta
DELETE FROM SGALERTASSYS.FUENTE_ALERTA_DETALLE ADI WHERE ADI.ID_FUENTE_ALERTA = :id_fuente_alerta
DELETE FROM SGALERTASSYS.FUENTE_ALERTA ADI WHERE ADI.ID_FUENTE_ALERTA = :id_fuente_alerta

SELECT MAX(NRO_REGISTRO) FROM SGALERTASSYS.FUENTE_ALERTA C with (nolock) INNER JOIN SGALERTASSYS.FUENTE_ALERTA_DETALLE D with (nolock) ON C.ID_FUENTE_ALERTA = D.ID_FUENTE_ALERTA WHERE C.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = :p_id_regla_negocio
